hero.title: Mohammed
hero.subtitle: Photographer Studio
hero.description: Your Professional Photographer for Graduations, Weddings, Passport Photos, and More!

about.title: Welcome to Mohammed Photographer Studio
about.description: We specialize in capturing life's most precious moments. Whether it's graduation photos, wedding shoots, student portraits, or passport photos, our studio is here to make every moment memorable.

passport.title: Passport Photos (30 Photos)
passport.description: Quick and professional passport photo services, high quality prints.

student.title: Student Portraits (30 Photos)
student.description: High-quality portraits for school and academic records, digital and print.

grad_single.title: Graduation Single (30 Photos)
grad_single.description: Capture the proud moments of your academic achievements.

grad_group.title: Graduation Group (30 Photos)
grad_group.description: Group photos for you and your fellow graduates in studio or outdoors.

wedding.title: Traditional Wedding (30 Photos)
wedding.description: Full coverage for traditional Ethiopian weddings, showcasing cultural heritage and attire.

camera.title: Professional Gear for Perfect Shots
camera.description: We use high-quality cameras and equipment to ensure that every photo we take meets the highest standards. Our studio is equipped with industry-leading lighting and optics to capture your best self.

gallery.title: Our Stunning Portfolio
gallery.description: Showcasing cultural beauty and professional photography from Ethiopia.

hours.title: Studio Working Hours
hours.description: We are open throughout the week to capture your special moments. Please check our timings and plan your visit or booking accordingly.

location.title: Studio Location
location.addressDetail: Summit Square | ሰሚት አሐባባይ, 2V22+JP8, Addis Ababa

reviews.title: Customer Reviews
reviews.r1: The studio atmosphere is incredibly professional. Mohammed knows exactly how to make you feel comfortable while capturing your best angles.
reviews.r2: Got my graduation photos here and they turned out better than I could have imagined. High resolution, great lighting, and quick delivery!
reviews.r3: Mohammed captured our traditional wedding perfectly. He has a deep understanding of cultural details which is reflected in every photo.

testimonials.title: What Clients Say
testimonials.t1: Mohammed delivered photos that exceeded our expectations. His attention to detail and technical skill are top-notch.
testimonials.t2: Working with Mohammed was a breeze. He understood our graduation requirements and turned them into elegant shots.
testimonials.t3: Our wedding photos are breathtaking. Mohammed truly knows how to capture the joy and cultural essence.

contact.title: Get in Touch
contact.description: Contact us today to book your session or inquire about our packages! Fill out the contact form below, and we will get back to you as soon as possible!
contact.location: Summit Square | ሰሚት አሐባባይ, 2V22+JP8, Addis Ababa
contact.readyDesc: Book your preferred date and time for a 30-photo session package.

footer.description: Our website is designed to be user-friendly, ensuring you can easily navigate through the galleries, services, and contact information. Book your 30-photo package or view our stunning portfolio with just a few clicks!
